name: SqliteClient
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "./SqliteClient.ts" module as `SqliteClient`.

name: SqliteMigrator
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "./SqliteMigrator.ts" module as `SqliteMigrator`.

name: TypeId
description: Runtime type identifier used to mark Cloudflare Durable Object `SqliteClient` values.

name: SqliteClient
description:
Service tag for the Cloudflare Durable Object SQLite client service.

**When to use**

Use to access or provide a Durable Object SQLite client through the Effect
context.

name: make
description: Creates a scoped Cloudflare Durable Object SQLite client around Durable Object SQLite storage, serializing access and converting returned `ArrayBuffer` values to `Uint8Array`.
signature: declare const make: (options: SqliteClientConfig) => Effect.Effect<SqliteClient, never, Scope.Scope | Reactivity.Reactivity>

name: layerConfig
description: Creates a layer from a `Config`-wrapped Durable Object SQLite client configuration, providing both `SqliteClient` and `SqlClient`.
signature: declare const layerConfig: (config: Config.Wrap<SqliteClientConfig>) => Layer.Layer<SqliteClient | Client.SqlClient, Config.ConfigError>

name: layer
description: Creates a layer from a concrete Durable Object SQLite client configuration, providing both `SqliteClient` and `SqlClient`.
signature: declare const layer: (config: SqliteClientConfig) => Layer.Layer<SqliteClient | Client.SqlClient>

name: SqliteClient
description: Cloudflare Durable Object SQLite client service, extending `SqlClient` with its configuration. `updateValues` is not supported.

name: SqliteClientConfig
description: Configuration for a Cloudflare Durable Object SQLite client, including either a `SqlStorage` handle or the full `DurableObjectStorage` for transaction support, span attributes, and query/result name transforms.
signature:
export interface SqliteClientConfig {
  readonly db?: SqlStorage | undefined
  readonly storage?: DurableObjectStorage | undefined
  readonly spanAttributes?: Record<string, unknown> | undefined

  readonly transformResultNames?: ((str: string) => string) | undefined
  readonly transformQueryNames?: ((str: string) => string) | undefined
}

name: TypeId
description: Type-level identifier used to mark Cloudflare Durable Object `SqliteClient` values.

name: run
description: Runs SQL migrations using the configured `SqlClient`, returning the migrations that were applied.
signature: declare const run: <R2 = never>({ loader, schemaDirectory, table }: Migrator.MigratorOptions<R2>) => Effect.Effect<ReadonlyArray<readonly [id: number, name: string]>, Migrator.MigrationError | SqlError, Client.SqlClient | R2>

name: layer
description: Creates a layer that runs the configured SQL migrations during layer construction.
signature: declare const layer: <R>(options: Migrator.MigratorOptions<R>) => Layer.Layer<never, Migrator.MigrationError | SqlError, Client.SqlClient | R>

name: "effect/unstable/sql/Migrator"
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "effect/unstable/sql/Migrator" module.
